name: Parker House Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the yeast in cooled milk.
2. Add salt, shortening, sugar, and water to the yeast mixture.
3. Gradually add flour, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Turn dough onto a lightly floured board and knead until smooth.
5. Roll the dough to 1/3 inch thickness.
6. Cut rounds that are 2 inches in diameter.
7. Fold each round in half lengthwise with a knife.
8. Brush one side of each roll lightly with butter.
9. Fold the rolls over, pressing together with the palm of your hand.
10. Place on an oiled baking sheet and let rise until tripled in bulk.
11. Bake at 450°F for 15 to 18 minutes.
